sentences.text: The hospital is full tonight for a Friday night. More than ever.
Connie and John are having a discussion on a patient that needs a heart transplant asap.
John mentions that this surgery is more so important because it is a child.
Connie opens up that they are having a hard time finding a heart.
Connie starts researching other hospitals to find this heart. [SENT]
Shea and Christian are meeting in Shea's office.
Christian sits down at Shea's desk.
Shea asks him what he thinks about the deal they are making?
Christian tells him that he is speculative of the situation.
He asks Shea if he feels at all concerned about the deal.
When Shea expresses concern, Christian sits in silence, thinking.
At that moment, Bradley lets two women into Shea's office unexpectedly.
Shea points to them and tells Christian to get them out immediately.
Christian rises and stops the women from entering the office.
When Bradley tries to speak to Shea, Christian whispers to him that he will kill him. [SENT]
Denzel and his friend was having an argument. They were arguing over Mila.
Denzel claims that Mila liked him more and that she would never like an old man like his friend.
His friend retaliated and started to throw a punch when all of a sudden, Mila appeared.
Mila saw the two of them fighting and she became very upset.
Just when the situation didn't seem to get anymore complicated, Tom and Gary walks in professing their love for Mila. [SENT]
James was very worried and he try to order his medicine.
He was very alone at home.
James trying to call again.
Room was very dark.
James was trying to get up.
James leg was still not working.
James again trying to get up from wheelchair.
James was in the darkness.
Room's door was closed.
James was feeling helpless. [SENT]
Gary meets with Jennifer to discuss their tribulations.
Gary laughs that Jennifer has no filter ever.
Jennifer proceeds to tell Gary that she is aware they had a hot steamy past together but she doesn't want that now.
She pleads with Gary.
Letting Gary know that they can only be friends now.
Gary has great disappointment in her. [SENT]
Vincent is the dancing coach of Natalie and was instructing her about her moves.
Vincent told her that her dancing was not up to the mark and with such a performance she can never win a tournament.
A strange man named Kevin was listening to their conversation and looking at Natalie mysteriously.
Natalie was in tears because she was not able to give her best and thought herself to be a failure.
She got upset and went to the dressing room where she found the fellow dancers were waiting for her. [SENT]
Leo talks to himself to start to build confidence in himself. He needs to tell her they are breaking up.
His girlfriend is asleep on the bed, unaware what will happen.
He is ready to get her up.
He tells her that they need to break up as soon as possible.
He gets dressed and heads out the door. [SENT]
As the ladies looked out of the diner they saw the entrance sign.
They continued to look outside and started to have a conversation.
The one girl started talking to the other about what was in the paper.
The other girl hadn't seen the article.
So the actress gave a copy to her friend so she can read what's going on in the paper. [SENT]
Jack walks into the room not knowing what to expect.
The room is a bathroom all decorated in an emerald green color.
The woman steps out of the bathtub greeting Jack with her nakedness.
Jack embraces the woman, wet and dripping with the bathwater.
Jack realizes that the woman is disgusting and full of sores.
He backs away from the woman immediately. [SENT]
Rosario is on the stage preparing for the large concert that is being held there.
Anthony is helping Rosario get through the process of setting up.
Anthony notices that there is an electronic part that needs to be altered.
Anthony starts to shift the electronic part.
The stage begins to illuminate stronger. [SENT]
George was sick in the hospital and had know idea what was wrong.
Jacques was the hospital administrator.
Jacques was tasked with explaining George's illness to Cary and Audrey.
Cary and Audrey were George's closest relatives and they were very concerned.
Jacques did his best to explain George's condition to Cary and Audrey. [SENT]
The dog was lying on the floor, staring back at Ben.
Ben was terrified of that creature and he was slowly backing off.
Ben wasn't quick enough, the dog jumped up and bit his finger.
Ben dropped the dog and challenge it to fight him.
The dog started to approach him viciously.
Suddenly he jumped up again and attacked Ben. [SENT]
The sheriff was mad because people in the town kept fighting.
The men all gathered their guns to continue the ongoing conflict.
They redid their guns in case they had to use them.
They even loaded them with extra bullets, anticipating a long night of fighting.
They went out into the foggy night, ready for war. [SENT]
Jim and Jeff showed up to a gala uninvited.
The others at the gala kept looking at them. They knew they didn't belong here.
Jim and Jeff couldn't believe all of the free alcohol they had access to.
Jim started feeling bad.
He was about to vomit. He drank a little too much. [SENT]
A computer screen has a message on it from a email.
A man is looking at it then Jean walks into the room.
Tom is asking why he is there to look after him.
He says that he got a message from his girlfriend.
Jean asks him what does the message on the computer say. [SENT]
Dane was very upset because he received a call from a woman and she was extorting him.
She arranged to meet him in a parking lot, here they would meet and come to an agreement.
After two hours he arrived at the meeting site.
Demi commented her requirements.
Dane accepted them. [SENT]
Jeff and his friend Jim are on a vacation from their wives and are spending their entire week at a nice hotel where they can just have fun without any worries.
When Jim picks up a newspaper to read he notices something interesting.
They both see that there is going to be a Preservationists Gala tomorrow night and they both thought it would be a great event to crash!
They both go to the barbershop in order to get them selves looking as good as they possibly can so they can blend in with the crowd at the Gala.
Once they were done getting their hair done they were both extremely excited to go to a fancy event where they won't have their wives to nag them. [SENT]
Val is robs the bank while taking the employees hostage. It's a tense situation.
Robert is contemplating going after Val and subduing him.
Robert then notices there is another robber and his plans to save the day are dashed.
Val makes his way to the vault to retrieve the loot unabated.
Val makes sure to threaten the hostages for good measure to ensure they co-operate. [SENT]
She hung the sheets in the sunshine, listening to the birdsong of morning, the breeze ruffling her hair. She could hear the bang and crack of her husband splitting wood.
He swung the axe high and slammed it down on the logs, one at a time, each splitting expertly into pieces that would fit in their wood stove. He was in the rhythm of it, and it was satisfying work.
She was heading back into their farmhouse when she heard the squawking of a chicken, and turned to see her husband beheading it with the axe. It was going to be a good supper tonight, for a change.
He called out to his wife, asking her to fetch water from the well.
She ran to the well, knowing full well if she was not quick that he would punish her.
She filled the bucket at the well.
He looked down at the headless chicken and pondered the situation. Living in this remote outpost was hard, he wondered if and when life would get easier.
She ran back to him, water sloshing out of the pan, her bare feet padding against the cool dewy grass. [SENT]
Two young girls sit traumatized in front of a destroyed house, the younger one having placed her head into the lap of her older sister. A young boy is leaning against a beam in complete apathy.
As Mel approaches the scene of total war destruction, with his boys and Heath, he shudders to think what has happened.
Every part of his beautiful plantation home is burned down and in total ruins. As Mel draws closer, he sees his young son dead in front of the house, killed by a gunshot wound to his chest.
Mel kneels down to talke a close look at his killed boy.
his bloodied hand showing that he clutched unto death some of his favorite military tin soldier pieces, representing what his father went to war for.
Mel is totally distraught and destroyed over the death of his young son and pledges revenge against whoever the perpetrator is.
Heath understands the deep meaning of this scene of horror and destruction of a family's happiness, and ponders his place in the war against the English and life.
As the family buries their young son, a deep sadness befalls the family as they all ask themselves what other cost there will be extracted from them as part of this upheaval. [SENT]
A game of football was happening.
The two teams had a great rivalry with each other.
But that rivalry was not as intense as the rivalry between Roger and Rene.
The two had made a bet on who would win.
The loser would have to pay the winner $1000 in cash. [SENT]
There were some old family photos that were being shown around.
Some of them had Tom having a good time with his old high school buddies.
Sally also had a photo of her with her old high school friends.
A lot of people were just having a lot of fun, enjoying their life.
Tom would take one last photo before he passed. [SENT]
Naomi has been alone in her house for days.
She is desperate because she was abandoned by her lover.
She begins to delirious and no longer knows how to distinguish dream from reality.
She goes into a deep despair. She is suffering a lot.
And she wakes up in a different place than she was before. [SENT]
Brian is waiting in his office for a phone call.
The phone rings and Brian's co-worker, Joan answers it.
Joan is scared but also curious as they have been waiting for this call.
Outside the building, Matt has a rifle and it is targeted on the head of Julia, who also works with Joan and Brian.
Matt is the one on the phone, and talks to Joan while he sets his sights.
The team try to circumnavigate Matt's location by tracking his cellphone.
Matt watches them as they all nervously move around the office.
Julia is sad because she found out she was the only person targeted.
Joan suspects she knows where Matt is and looks at the roof across the street.
The city can be a dangerous place. [SENT]
Amy was waiting for her husband to get out of a meeting. She was very worried, because he was a very shy man.
Christian, her husband, got out as if there was nothing wrong.
However, Amy knew her husband very well, and quickly rushed to help him.
His legs gave out as soon as they were together. He was very nervous!.
She helped him inside his car and they drove home to have a nice meal!. [SENT]
A fancy dinner is taking place inside of a dimly lit restaurant.
James looks over his shoulder to notice someone.
There is a woman sitting at a table with a green dress.
James gets up and approaches Kim.
An antique car is parked outside along a walking bridge.
A man with a hat waits in the car. [SENT]
Three friends were at the table talking about their favorite pizza toppings.
Ben heard them talking and told his friend that it is obviously mushrooms.
Ben told his other friend and his other friend said it was anchovies.
Ben looked disgusted.
Ben's friend decided that the friendship would end if anchovies were not given the proper respect they deserved. [SENT]
A juror is trying not to fidget during the trial.
The defendant is trying not to fidget in her best uncomfortable hat.
The judge formally reads out the charges.
He says that he's going to remind the jury to make an unbiased decision.
The defendant glances nervously behind her at the jury. [SENT]
Jason wanted to take his buddies to the bar.
Nick suggested they go to a vegan restaurant instead.
Jason looked at Nick with contempt and yelled at him.
Dexter called the boys to see what they would want to do.
Jason said that he would prefer to go to the vegan place. [SENT]
The bar was completely quiet.
Suddenly there was a sound of glass shattering.
Jason jumped up from his seat.
There was a guy lying on the ground.
Jason started to fight with Nick who wanted to attack him.
There was a glass breaking, people screaming.
Someone threw some drinks in Nick's face. [SENT]
The troop had regrouped in a remote island.
The helicopter dropped more rescued paratroopers.
They pitched a tent nearby and were camping there until they could be transported back to the country.
They were excited to see each other after a gruelling assignment that had isolated most of them.
Fredric was enjoying his first cigarette after months.
Laurence couldn't wait to go back home.
Martin drank his first cold beer in ages and it felt like the best beer he ever had.
One of the men brought in a paper that he had stolen from the helicopter's stash. It had belonged to their officer.
The men read it and realised that their government was planning to kill the team as they had been part of a covert mission that was unauthorised and couldn't risk it being leaked. [SENT]
Ben was fighting with his dog. His dog and eaten his last cookie and Ben wanted his dog to throw up the cookie he had just eaten.
Ben tried catching his dog but his dog only bit his finger.
Ben yelled in pain as Cameron and Lin arrived to see what all the commotion was about.
Ben collapsed onto the ground, unable to take the pain.
Lin started screaming at Ben hysterically as she knew Ben had just tried hurting his dog. [SENT]
Two people bust into the door with guns trying to rob the bank.
A bank teller on the ground is telling them not to shoot.
People outside spot them and trying to get into a good position.
A bank teller is on the ground trying to crawl away.
The two robbers think about what they should do. [SENT]
Jude was talking to Philip.
Matt walked in and interrupted their conversation.
Matt didn't have too much to say though.
Later, Matt was butting in again.
It seemed like Matt was always lurking around.
Jude and Philip decided to spy on Matt for a change.
It was hard to do with Matt always one step behind them. [SENT]
Matt and Jude were walking around the grand station because they were lost.
Matt looked into the map he kept in his notebook.
Jude was getting frustrated because he hates getting lost.
The men looked around in fear of being lost in the big city.
Jude finally had enough and left the station to go ask for help. [SENT]
The party continues on, into the early morning hours.
Eric sighs, as he misses his wife dearly.
Mark glances at Eric in sorrow. He understands how hard it must be to be without his wife.
David tells Mark to not worry about it. He says that it is not any of their business.
The woman glances over with flirty eyes at Eric. [SENT]
Jennifer was bored one day so she went for a carriage ride on the boardwalk.
The carriage was drawn by a bicycle and she was fascinated by the tales the driver told. As they rode past one of the town's most famous casinos, Jennifer felt an itch.
She thought that she may have been bitten by a mosquito.
The driver suggested they ride to get some insect repellent.
Jennifer said no and she hopped out of the carriage immediately. [SENT]
Kevin drove for Uber.
William called for a car. Kevin accepted the fair. Kevin picked up William.
Kevin wanted to know where to take William.
William said to turn around and head west.
Kevin turned the car around. William asked for the car to be stopped.
William jumped out. William paid Kevin. Kevin was very sad about working as an Uber driver. [SENT]
Doctors at this hospital have been having a hard time keeping up with the amount of patients coming in due to the wide spread cases of a local disease.
One of the patients named Jude had a special case of infections that led to many complications with his health.
His significant other Nicole comes by in a rush to see how he is doing.
Once she gets to his bed side she sees the horrible shape Jude is in and tries to talk to him.
When she receives no response from Jude she becomes very worried and everyone around her could tell that things were not going to be okay. [SENT]
Ellen finds Robert passed out drunk on the floor and looks on in disgust.
Robert jolts awake and is confused about where he is.
He stands up and realizes he's in the kitchen.
Ellen and Leonardo both start to tell Robert off.
Robert tries to defend himself and push back against them.
Leonardo loses his temper and begins yelling at Robert.
Robert snaps and yells back.
The fight between the three escalates. [SENT]
Sam wanted to play in the water.
He invited Richard and Brooke.
They also brought Linda too to play.
Linda had the most fun playing in the water.
Being a little kid, she didn't care about getting all wet. In fact, she like getting dirty and wet.
Sam had a lot of fun too. [SENT]
Angelina went to a meeting with her friends.
there she met Jonny, Renoly, Matthew.
she liked them very much, they were very nice people.
they talked about many topics for many hours and shared drinks.
meanwhile Fisher was spying on them with his cameras, Fisher was a psychopath.
Fisher spent the whole night spying on them. [SENT]
Memories of his son were coming to his mind.
Memories of his daughter too.
Before the crash had happened.
His wife tried to calm him down.
Billy was desperate, he could not forgive himself.
Then his mind would suddenly shift to other things.
It would shift to other memories.
His mind would never stick to a certain time. [SENT]
Harrison is evading a band of native Indians in the Amazonas basin,.
as he comes across a river and simply jumps in without looking. Hus pursuers are too close and indecision and inaction would result in him getting the proverbial short end of the stick.
Harrison jumps in in one fell swoop and.
swims away from the water's edge.
as angry natives draw closer, but realize that they cannot stop Harrison from getting away.
Finally, Harrison gets to his hidden-away biplane that will take him to safety. [SENT]
A wily looking Daniel is trying to impress on his friends that he is not cheating them.
The atmosphere in the bar where they are sitting, is dark, dingy and foreboding.
Daniel realizes that his exhortations are not credible and tries to regroup and think of additional angles with which to persuade the group with Gary sitting behind him in stony silence and demeanor.
John, who is the man that Daniel must address himself to, is not impressed by Daniel's plea, with his associates exuding little confidence in what Daniel has been trying to convey.
Daniel is getting ever more desperate to convince the men around him that he is telling the truth,.
in the process getting aggravated, steaming with obvious contempt and anger. [SENT]
Reese is the only one in class who knows the answer to the teacher's question.
The teacher, Matthew notices that Reese is always first to answer and is very attentive in class.
Reese answers the question correctly.
Matthew looks up Reese in the yearbook to see what extracurricular activities she is in.
He finds that Reese is student body president among other things. She's a great student. [SENT]
Greta was at the park, trying to set up a picnic for her and her friends.
Jake came over, asking if he could help her.
She smiled and told him she did not need any of his help.
Natalie was also at the park setting up her portion of the picnic, but she was with a new boyfriend.
Ashton came by and saw that she had another man, so he got sad.
He left without saying anything. [SENT]
Val put on a ski mask and is walking into a financial firm.
Once in the financial firm, Val tells everyone to put their hands behind their heads and to get down. He yells that he is robbing the place.
Everyone that works at the financial firm is getting down with their hands up so that Val doesn't shoot them.
Robert sees Val, and although he is down on the floor with his hands up, Robert is planning to stop Val.
Val made it into the safe where all of the safety deposit boxes are kept.
Val is picking and choosing which boxes he will steal. [SENT]
There was a major shootout in the mall parking lot. Robert was one of the shooters.
Al was trying to hide behind his car so he would not be shot.
Val, who was one of the gunmen, continued to shoot at police.
Robert pulled out another gun as he tried to get behind a white car.
The police shot as they checked on one of their fallen men. [SENT]
An Italian mob boss secretly invited some FBI agents to come up with a deal to leave his mob alone.
The agents, Colin and Jamie, were doubtful that any deal could be worked out.
The boss told them that they would get 5% of all his profits.
Colin replied that they would need a lot more than that.
Jamie called it chump change. [SENT]
Christoph's assistant came to him when he got back to his office to tell him that an American spy was caught.
Christoph went to the basement to meet him.
He told the spy that spies were the scum of the earth.
He admitted to having killed spies before.
He said Brad would now be his spy. [SENT]
The ranch where Charles Manson based his group is in the background, but one woman didnt want to go along with everything.
Charles Manson, this picture taken sometime after his arrest. His spacey, even evil look about him, could shiver even the strongest among us.
Robert looks through evidence on the hunt for Charles. A bit of clothing they believe to be his.
A group of dead men, victims of Manson over a period of time.
A reenactment with actors and actresses shows how the crimes took place. [SENT]
Kate was watching jealousy as her husband was talking to another woman at the party.
Jake was taking to Lisa, who was very beautiful.
Kate went over to Interrupt their conversation so it did not go too far.
Luckily it was dinner time so they all went inside.
Kate still looked at her husband with an angry face for talking to another woman. [SENT]
Julie mingled with guests at a dinner party. She payed attention to people.
Julie talked with Sam. Sam told Julie about how Ronald was kind of a goofy person.
Julie sat at a table across from Sam and Ronald. Julie watched for any sign of goofiness from Ronald.
Ronald began to smoke a cigarette in a weird way. Sam reached to take the cigarette from Ronald.
Ronald pulled his hand away from Sam. [SENT]
Paul was sailing on his yacht when a ship full of men rode up next to it.
They wanted money from Paul.
Paul told them that he doesn't have any money on the yacht.
The men pulled out their rifles.
Paul suggested that they give the men one of his women instead. [SENT]
Shia was being questioned for a murder investigation, but he was innocent.
Billy told him he was going to put him in jail for the crimes.
He gave Shia a chance to take a deal for a lesser sentence.
Shia maintained that he was innocent.
Billy laughed, as he started to leave the room. [SENT]
Dean sits down in the booth and takes a sip of his coffee, not saying anything to Kate.
Kate asks Dean if everything is okay.
Dean motions to his chest and explains that he has heartburn.
From the restaurant register, Tom watches the date between Dean and Kate, feeling jealous.
Kate asks Dean if he wants to leave and go for a walk at the park. [SENT]
The gang had been riding for awhile so the leader, Jeff decided to have them take a rest.
He dismounted from his horse as the others looked on.
Hailee, the only female in the group was concerned that something bad was going to happen as there had been some recent verbal exchanges between the men.
Matt was one of the those who were at odds with the leader and he asked, "Do we have a plan or our we going to just wander the country side"?.
Jeff pulled out his pistol and responded by asking Matt if he wanted to be leader?.
Matt laughed it off and replied, "Only after one of us is dead!". [SENT]
Tom had lost a small part on the floor. Tom searched the floor.
Tom was upset that he could not find the small part.
Tom read the manual. Tom wanted to know if the project could be completed without the small part.
Tom read the manual from cover to cover.
Tom was upset that the project could not be completed without the lost part. [SENT]
Tom looks around the room. Tom knows that Bill has something to say.
Tom asks Bill is there is something wrong.
Bill states that there is something wrong. Bill asks Tom to sit down.
Tom stares at Bill. Tom remains standing.
Bill get up and looks at Tom.
Bill walks away from Tom. [SENT]
